title: Cobblemore Lib
description: System that stores all the items/assets/recipes/codes in common between my mods.
body:
COBBLEMORE LIBRARY

◽System that stores all the items/assets/recipes/codes in common between my mods.
◽This system is necessary for some of my mods.


My mods:

Cobblemon: Create Industries : Integration between Cobblemon + Create, recipe for balls, items, sweets, etc ...
Cobblemon: Additions & Tools : Adds new armor, tools and weapons made from evolutionary stones.
Cobblemon: Simple Pokecenter's : Adds a new pokemon center, with healing machine and computer.
